d_prodej_pokladny.description: Siroky pruchod z prodejni plochy do pokladni zony (jednosmerny)

d_exit.description: Vychod z obchodu na vychodni strane

d_wc.description: Dvere do WC zakazniku z pokladni zony

prazska_krizovatka.description: Křižovatka dvou silnic s řadovými domky v pražském stylu

barokni_mestansky_dum.name: Barokní měšťanský dům
barokni_mestansky_dum.description: Třípatrový řadový dům v barokním stylu, 8m × 16m, s průjezdem, piano nobile a mansardou

prujezd.name: Průjezd (Passage)
prujezd.description: Průjezd z ulice na dvůr, klenutý strop

salon.name: Salon (Grand Salon)
salon.description: Hlavní reprezentační místnost, štukové stropy, fresky

jidelna.name: Jídelní sál (Dining Hall)
jidelna.description: Jídelní sál s krbem a lušrem

pracovna.name: Pracovna (Study)
pracovna.description: Studovna s knihovnou a psacím stolem

test_project.name: Test Project
test_project.description: Black-box testing of all MCP tools

english_garden.name: English Garden
english_garden.description: Traditional English country garden, 60x50m, with formal and informal zones, paths, water features, and all classic garden elements

terrace.name: Stone Terrace
terrace.description: Flagstone terrace adjoining the house, with seating area and planters

planter_1.name: Stone Planter - Lavender
planter_1.description: Large stone planter with English lavender

terrace_steps.name: Stone Steps to Garden
terrace_steps.description: Broad stone steps descending from terrace to garden level

parasol.name: Garden Parasol
parasol.description: Large canvas parasol over a lounge seating area

wall_trellis.name: Wall Trellis - Clematis
wall_trellis.description: Wooden trellis on the house wall with Clematis montana and jasmine

herbaceous_border.name: Herbaceous Border
herbaceous_border.description: Deep mixed herbaceous border with delphiniums, lupins, foxgloves, peonies, and geraniums along the south garden wall

section_delphiniums.name: Delphiniums & Hollyhocks
section_delphiniums.description: Tall back-of-border: delphiniums, hollyhocks, verbascum, foxgloves

section_peonies.name: Peonies & Lupins
section_peonies.description: Mid-border: peonies, lupins, achillea, echinops, crocosmia

section_geraniums.name: Geraniums & Salvias
section_geraniums.description: Front-to-mid: hardy geraniums, salvias, nepeta, alchemilla mollis

section_asters.name: Asters & Rudbeckia
section_asters.description: Autumn interest: Michaelmas daisies, rudbeckia, sedum, anemone japonica

section_grasses.name: Ornamental Grasses
section_grasses.description: Miscanthus, stipa gigantea, pennisetum, hakonechloa, with late-season alliums

section_roses_climbers.name: Climbing Roses on Wall
section_roses_climbers.description: Wall-trained climbing roses with underplanting of lavender and catmint

rose_garden.name: Formal Rose Garden
rose_garden.description: Rectangular formal rose garden with central fountain, symmetrical beds, and gravel paths

fountain.name: Central Fountain
fountain.description: Stone fountain with tiered basins and gentle water flow, the centerpiece of the rose garden

rose_bed_nw.name: Rose Bed NW
rose_bed_nw.description: Hybrid tea roses: Peace, Mister Lincoln, Double Delight

rose_bed_ne.name: Rose Bed NE
rose_bed_ne.description: Floribunda roses: Iceberg, Queen Elizabeth, Europeana

rose_bed_sw.name: Rose Bed SW
rose_bed_sw.description: David Austin English roses: Graham Thomas, Gertrude Jekyll, Abraham Darby

rose_bed_se.name: Rose Bed SE
rose_bed_se.description: Climbing roses trained on low obelisks: New Dawn, Compassion, Albertine

sundial.name: Sundial
sundial.description: Bronze sundial on a stone pedestal, positioned on the main garden axis

kitchen_garden.name: Walled Kitchen Garden
kitchen_garden.description: Brick-walled kitchen garden with raised vegetable beds, herb spiral, espaliered fruit trees, cold frames, and compost area

veg_bed_1.name: Vegetable Bed - Root Veg
veg_bed_1.description: Raised bed: carrots, parsnips, beetroot, turnips

veg_bed_2.name: Vegetable Bed - Brassicas
veg_bed_2.description: Raised bed: cabbages, kale, Brussels sprouts, broccoli

veg_bed_3.name: Vegetable Bed - Legumes
veg_bed_3.description: Raised bed: runner beans on canes, broad beans, peas

veg_bed_4.name: Vegetable Bed - Salad
veg_bed_4.description: Raised bed: lettuce, radish, spring onion, rocket

veg_bed_6.name: Vegetable Bed - Alliums
veg_bed_6.description: Raised bed: onions, garlic, leeks, shallots

herb_spiral.name: Herb Spiral
herb_spiral.description: Stone herb spiral: rosemary, thyme, sage, oregano, mint, parsley, chives, basil

espalier_wall.name: Espaliered Fruit Trees
espalier_wall.description: South-facing wall with espaliered pear and apple trees

compost_area.name: Compost Area
compost_area.description: Three-bin composting system with leaf mould cage

rhubarb_patch.name: Rhubarb Patch
rhubarb_patch.description: Rhubarb forcing pots and established crowns

lawn.name: Main Lawn
lawn.description: Large open lawn, quintessential English garden feature, bordered by hedges and mixed borders

croquet_lawn.name: Croquet Lawn Area
croquet_lawn.description: Flat, finely mown area for croquet, the quintessential English garden game

specimen_cedar.name: Cedar of Lebanon
specimen_cedar.description: Majestic specimen cedar of Lebanon (Cedrus libani) — iconic English garden tree with spreading horizontal branches

topiary_garden.name: Topiary Garden
topiary_garden.description: Formal topiary garden with clipped yew and box hedges in geometric shapes

topiary_center.name: Central Yew Obelisk
topiary_center.description: Tall clipped yew obelisk at the center of the topiary garden

pergola_walk.name: Pergola Walk
pergola_walk.description: Covered walkway with oak pergola draped in climbing roses and wisteria

pond.name: Water Garden and Pond
pond.description: Naturalistic pond with water lilies, iris, marsh marigolds, and a small wooden bridge

pond_water.name: Pond Water
pond_water.description: Naturalistic pond with water lilies (Nymphaea), water forget-me-not, and oxygenating plants

bridge.name: Wooden Bridge
bridge.description: Small arched wooden bridge crossing the narrower end of the pond

bog_garden.name: Bog Garden
bog_garden.description: Moisture-loving plants: astilbe, ligularia, primula candelabra, gunnera

iris_bed.name: Iris & Reed Bed
iris_bed.description: Yellow flag iris, phragmites, and marsh marigolds along the south shore

willow_tree.name: Weeping Willow
willow_tree.description: Graceful weeping willow overhanging the northeast corner of the pond

pond_bench.name: Pond Viewing Bench
pond_bench.description: Teak bench for contemplating the water garden

orchard.name: Orchard
orchard.description: Traditional fruit orchard with apple, pear, plum, and cherry trees in a grid, with wildflower understory

wildflower_meadow.name: Wildflower Meadow
wildflower_meadow.description: Naturalistic wildflower meadow with native poppies, cornflowers, ox-eye daisies, and meadow grasses

meadow_poppies.name: Poppy & Cornflower Drift
meadow_poppies.description: Field poppies, cornflowers, and corn marigolds

meadow_daisies.name: Ox-eye Daisy Drift
meadow_daisies.description: Ox-eye daisies, red clover, and buttercups

meadow_orchids.name: Wild Orchid Area
meadow_orchids.description: Common spotted orchid, bee orchid, pyramidal orchid

meadow_grasses.name: Native Grass Meadow
meadow_grasses.description: Yorkshire fog, crested dog's-tail, sweet vernal grass with knapweed and scabious

mown_path.name: Mown Grass Path
mown_path.description: Narrow mown path winding through the meadow

ha_ha.name: Ha-Ha
ha_ha.description: Sunken fence/ditch at the north boundary — classic English garden feature creating an invisible boundary to the countryside beyond

greenhouse.name: Greenhouse
greenhouse.description: Victorian-style iron and glass greenhouse for tender plants, seedlings, and overwintering

staging_bench_l.name: Staging Bench Left
staging_bench_l.description: Slatted wooden staging bench for pots and seedlings

potting_area.name: Potting Area
potting_area.description: Potting bench with soil bins and tools

citrus_trees.name: Citrus Trees in Pots
citrus_trees.description: Lemon and orange trees in terracotta pots, overwintering

garden_shed.name: Garden Shed
garden_shed.description: Timber garden shed for tool storage, potting, and garden supplies

tool_rack.name: Tool Rack
tool_rack.description: Wall-mounted rack for spades, forks, hoes, and rakes

potting_bench.name: Potting Bench
potting_bench.description: Sturdy potting bench with drawers for twine, labels, and seeds

mower_space.name: Mower Storage
mower_space.description: Space for cylinder mower and other machinery

gazebo.name: Gazebo
gazebo.description: Octagonal wooden gazebo with seating, overlooking the lawn and orchard

path_main_axis.name: Main Gravel Path (N-S axis)
path_main_axis.description: Central gravel path running north-south from the lawn through the rose garden to the terrace — the main visual axis of the garden

path_ew_south.name: East-West Path (South)
path_ew_south.description: Gravel path running east-west along the herbaceous border connecting terrace, greenhouse, and garden shed

path_ew_north.name: East-West Path (North)
path_ew_north.description: Gravel path running east-west along the north edge of the lawn, connecting orchard to pergola and pond

path_to_kitchen.name: Path to Kitchen Garden
path_to_kitchen.description: Gravel path connecting main garden to walled kitchen garden entrance

path_to_pond.name: Path to Pond
path_to_pond.description: Gravel path leading from the east-west north path down to the water garden

path_to_gazebo.name: Path to Gazebo
path_to_gazebo.description: Narrow gravel path from the west edge of the lawn to the gazebo

path_terrace_east.name: Path Terrace to Greenhouse
path_terrace_east.description: Gravel path from the terrace area eastward to the greenhouse

hedge_lawn_south.name: Yew Hedge - Lawn South
hedge_lawn_south.description: Clipped yew hedge bordering the south edge of the main lawn

hedge_lawn_west.name: Yew Hedge - Lawn West
hedge_lawn_west.description: Yew hedge along the west edge of the lawn

hedge_lawn_east.name: Yew Hedge - Lawn East
hedge_lawn_east.description: Yew hedge along the east edge of the lawn

hedge_rose_north.name: Box Hedge - Rose Garden N
hedge_rose_north.description: Low box hedge framing the north side of the rose garden

hedge_rose_west.name: Box Hedge - Rose Garden W
hedge_rose_west.description: Box hedge framing the west side of the rose garden

hedge_rose_east.name: Box Hedge - Rose Garden E
hedge_rose_east.description: Box hedge framing the east side of the rose garden

hedge_kitchen_n.name: Brick Wall - Kitchen N
hedge_kitchen_n.description: North brick wall of the kitchen garden

hedge_kitchen_w.name: Brick Wall - Kitchen W
hedge_kitchen_w.description: West brick wall of the kitchen garden

arch_rose_entry.name: Rose Arch - Rose Garden Entry
arch_rose_entry.description: Wrought iron arch with climbing roses at the entrance to the rose garden from the lawn

gate_kitchen.name: Gate to Kitchen Garden
gate_kitchen.description: Wooden gate in the brick wall, entrance to the kitchen garden

arch_pergola_w.name: Pergola West Arch
arch_pergola_w.description: Entrance arch at the west end of the pergola walk

arch_pergola_e.name: Pergola East Arch
arch_pergola_e.description: Entrance arch at the east end of the pergola walk

bench_lawn_w.name: Bench - Lawn West Viewpoint
bench_lawn_w.description: Teak bench on west side of lawn, facing east across the open green

bench_lawn_e.name: Bench - Lawn East Viewpoint
bench_lawn_e.description: Teak bench on east side of lawn, facing west with view of the orchard

bench_rose_s.name: Bench - Rose Garden South
bench_rose_s.description: Stone bench at the south end of the rose garden, overlooking the fountain

bench_orchard.name: Bench - Orchard
bench_orchard.description: Rustic wooden bench under an apple tree in the orchard

bench_ha_ha.name: Bench - Ha-ha Viewpoint
bench_ha_ha.description: Bench overlooking the ha-ha and the countryside beyond

bird_bath.name: Bird Bath
bird_bath.description: Stone bird bath on the main lawn, attracting garden birds

arch_terrace.name: Arch - Terrace to Herbaceous Border
arch_terrace.description: Stone arch with climbing wisteria leading from terrace steps to the garden

gate_orchard.name: Gate to Orchard
gate_orchard.description: Simple wooden five-bar gate leading into the orchard area

oak_tree.name: English Oak
oak_tree.description: Mature English oak (Quercus robur) providing shade at the west edge of the garden

copper_beech.name: Copper Beech
copper_beech.description: Mature copper beech (Fagus sylvatica f. purpurea) specimen tree in the northeast

silver_birch_1.name: Silver Birch Group
silver_birch_1.description: Group of three silver birches (Betula pendula) with white bark

magnolia.name: Magnolia
magnolia.description: Magnolia x soulangeana near the greenhouse, spectacular spring flowers

wisteria_tree.name: Wisteria Standard
wisteria_tree.description: Standard wisteria trained as a small tree near the terrace

holly_tree.name: Holly
holly_tree.description: English holly (Ilex aquifolium) with red berries

hedge_boundary_e.name: Eastern Boundary Hedge
hedge_boundary_e.description: Mixed native hedgerow: hawthorn, blackthorn, hazel, field maple — eastern boundary

hedge_boundary_w.name: Western Boundary Hedge
hedge_boundary_w.description: Mixed native hedgerow forming western boundary

climbing_rose_wall.name: Climbing Rose Wall
climbing_rose_wall.description: South-facing stone wall with climbing roses: Zephirine Drouhin, Madame Alfred Carriere

lavender_walk.name: Lavender Walk
lavender_walk.description: Double row of English lavender (Lavandula angustifolia) lining the path from terrace to rose garden
